<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get document metadata"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/documents/{DOC_ID}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



By using the document ID you can fetch a `Document` metadata.

  as={"h2"}
